tests.name: baseline_git_audit
tests.command: git status; git branch --show-current; git remote -v; git fetch origin --prune; git log --oneline --decorate --graph -n 30; git rev-parse HEAD; git rev-parse origin/main

tests.name: wp00_bootstrap_workflow_validation
tests.command: gh run watch 27469195284 --exit-status; gh run watch 27469195276 --exit-status; gh run list --commit eca0c72b7dfc38c541636324e46298df21ac3124 --limit 10

tests.name: official_action_release_audit
tests.command: gh release list -R actions/checkout --limit 5; gh release list -R actions/setup-python --limit 5; review official GitHub changelog entries for Node24 migration and Windows 2025 VS2026 migration

tests.name: wp01_local_validation
tests.command: python -c "yaml.safe_load(...)"; python -m pip check; python -m ruff check .; python -m mypy engine\\src; python -m pytest -m "not live"; python -m pytest -m "not live" --cov=openclaw_super_advisor --cov-report=term-missing --cov-report=json; openclaw-advisor validate-skills --strict; openclaw-advisor render-config --validate --strict; openclaw-advisor security-scan --include-history --strict; python -m pip_audit

blockers.summary: Code and workspace metadata are still at 1.2.0 / P2 while P2.1 tracking has started.
blockers.redacted_error: Metadata drift only; no secret exposure.
blockers.required_action: Advance package and workspace metadata in a later logical work package with matching validation updates.

blockers.summary: Workflows now use Node24-compatible actions, the Windows 2025 VS2026 test image, pip caching, minimal permissions, and artifact upload without the prior Node20 warning.
Live MT5 verification cannot run in the current environment because MT5 is disabled and the MetaTrader5 package, terminal path, and session credentials are unavailable.
blockers.redacted_error: MT5 readiness probe returned disabled/unavailable booleans only.
blockers.required_action: Enable MT5 and provide a live terminal/session environment to run WP-02 later.

next_action: Start WP-06 deterministic simulated soak coverage while keeping the unresolved metadata-version drift tracked for later closure.
